items.name_en: Goyard Vendôme Shell Bag TM
items.name_cn:
Goyard Vendôme Shell Bag TM
Inheriting the brand's unique craftsmanship and exquisite techniques: detachable shoulder strap, embedded wooden details, leather corners, large zipper, yellow lining, and its unique shell shape. More modern and refined, showcasing a woman's softness and lightness. Can be worn over the shoulder or carried by hand 👇🏻👇🏻
11 colors available: Black, Brown, Red, Burgundy, Yellow, Green, Grey, White, Sky Blue, and Navy Blue. 🌈
Size: 23cm (L) x 18.5cm (H) x 10cm (W)
020205

items.name_en: Goyard 2025 Limited Edition Goyard takes us on a stroll through a ever-changing, blooming garden, enjoying a double sensory and emotional experience. The SAINT LOUIS Mini Bag features two unique GOYARDINE canvas colors inspired by the bright tones of linen flowers, better highlighting the dual-use inspiration in the original SAINT LOUIS design.

items.name_en: Goyard Cisalpin Briefcase embodies the timeless elegance and exquisite craftsmanship of the Cisalpin backpack, presented in a new form. It reinterprets the design philosophy of the Goyard house, making it a loyal companion to safely store your business and personal items while remaining stylish. Designed for modern life.

items.name_en: Goyard 💕MORVAN Briefcase is lightweight, slim, and practical. Its compact and elegant design makes it an ideal choice for daily and professional use. It features a zip closure system, two round leather handles for comfortable carrying, and an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody wear.
items.name_cn:
Goyard 💕MORVAN Briefcase is lightweight, slim, and practical. Its compact and elegant design makes it an ideal choice for daily and professional use. It features a zip closure system, two round leather handles for comfortable carrying, and an adjustable shoulder strap for shoulder or crossbody wear.
Size: 39×6.5×29cm
Color: Black
Style: 120247

items.name_en: PETIT FLOT MINI is a refined mini version of the PETIT FLOT PM. Lightweight and compact, it retains the iconic bucket silhouette. The exquisite leather shoulder strap allows for easy switching between handbag, shoulder bag, and crossbody styles, showcasing its practical and versatile nature.

PETIT FLOT MINI is a refined mini version of the PETIT FLOT PM. Lightweight and compact, it retains the iconic bucket silhouette. The exquisite leather shoulder strap allows for easy switching between handbag, shoulder bag, and crossbody styles, showcasing its practical and versatile nature.
size:12×10×17.5cm
🔍020251
